config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu tidak boleh dikorbankan hanya demi alasan “kepentingan masyarakat,” karena sejarah sering menunjukkan bahwa dalih itu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kuasa. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya justru melihat pentingnya keseimbangan: masyarakat kuat kalau warganya dilindungi hak dasarnya, bukan saat individu selalu diminta mengalah. Kepentingan umum memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai tanpa menghapus martabat dan kebebasan pribadi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why many people emphasize collective stability and public order, because social harmony and shared responsibility are deeply valued, and in real crises like public health or disaster response, individual preferences sometimes must yield. But I do not think that gives society a blank check to override personal rights whenever it is convenient, because once “the public interest” becomes the excuse, abuse of power becomes very easy. The better standard is that society can limit individual rights only in narrow, clearly justified cases, and even then the limits must be transparent, proportionate, and accountable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk menekan suara kritis, padahal justru hak individu yang kuat membuat masyarakat lebih sehat dan pemerintah lebih akuntabel. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti bencana atau wabah ketika pembatasan tertentu masuk akal, tetapi itu harus terbatas, jelas, dan tidak boleh jadi kebiasaan. Jadi, kepentingan masyarakat penting, namun tidak boleh menjadi alasan untuk menghapus martabat dan kebebasan dasar seseorang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should sometimes come before individual rights, but only in limited and carefully controlled situations. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the appeal of putting collective stability first, especially in emergencies where public health, safety, or disaster response depends on fast coordination and personal sacrifice. But I do not accept the idea that society should automatically outrank the individual, because in practice that can easily become a justification for overreach and silence dissent. A healthy society is not one that crushes rights for the sake of order, but one that protects individual dignity while allowing necessary limits only when they are truly necessary, proportionate, and accountable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu karena di Indonesia dalih “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan terhadap kritik, kebebasan berpendapat, dan hak minoritas. Memang benar, dalam kondisi darurat seperti wabah atau bencana, kepentingan umum bisa membatasi sebagian kebebasan individu, tetapi itu harus benar-benar sementara, terukur, dan diawasi ketat. Tanpa perlindungan hak individu yang kuat, “kepentingan masyarakat” mudah berubah menjadi alat kekuasaan, bukan benar-benar untuk kebaikan bersama. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari individu yang haknya dihormati, bukan dari individu yang terus diminta mengalah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically outrank the rights of the individual, and I say that from a Chinese perspective that values order but also knows the danger of unchecked authority. I understand the argument for collective stability, especially in emergencies like public health crises or disasters, where some rights may need temporary limits for the common good. But once "society first" becomes a general principle, it can easily be used to silence criticism, weaken minority protections, and excuse overreach. For me, the right balance is that individual rights remain the default, and any restriction must be narrow, necessary, proportional, and accountable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
